verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When your waters are so troubled, You don't think you count at all. Waves may seem like mountains, When your boat is oh so small. But somewhere past the clouds, Waits a new day to begin. Sometimes it takes a storm, To calm your storm within.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Sometimes it takes a storm, To know you need a shelter. When the anchors in your life, Disappear without a trace. Sometimes the wind will rage, Before you sail calm waters. Sometimes it takes a storm, To find a hiding place.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: They were drifting in the darkness, The sea was all around. They cried out to the master, Please save us or we'll drown. Jesus heard the cries, And mercy stilled the wind. Sometimes it takes a storm, To see the sun again.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes the wind will rage, Before you sail calm waters. Lord thank you for the storms, For I've found my hiding place. Oh thank you for the storms, Lord you are my hiding place.
